title: BPMB Award of Group Undergraduate Scholarship (BAGUS)
description: BPMB Award of Group Undergraduate Scholarship (BAGUS)
raw_eligibility:
Transform Your Education
with BAGUS
(BPMB Award of Group’s Undergraduate Scholarship)

Bank Pembangunan Malaysia Berhad (Bank Pembangunan) is dedicated to nurturing promising Malaysian talents who will play a pivotal role in advancing the nation’s development agenda through our BPMB Award of Group’s Undergraduate Scholarship (BAGUS) programme.

Application Process

BAGUS
Scholarships for Malaysia's Outstanding Students

Open to Malaysia’s outstanding students, the BAGUS programme offers opportunities to pursue undergraduate degrees in banking-related disciplines at prestigious universities locally and abroad. To be eligible, applicants must meet the criteria listed below:

Citizen of Malaysia
Aged at least 17 years old and not more than 23 years old
Completed Pre-university/Foundation/Matriculation/Diploma programme and achieved excellent examination results in any of the following:
STPM/A-Level: Minimum of 3As
Diploma/Matriculation: Minimum Cumulative Grade Point Average (CGPA) of 3.50
Australian Matriculation: Minimum ATAR of 80%
American Foundation Programme: Minimum SAT score of 1,200
SPM: Minimum 7As in Sijil Pelajaran Malaysia or equivalent
Possess good interpersonal and communication skills
Ability to demonstrate leadership qualities and potential
Actively involved in extra-curricular activities and sports
Applicants must not be a recipient of any other scholarship or award from other organisations/foundations
Application from undergraduate students in year 1 will also be considered

Our scholarship recipients will have access to world-class education, covering fields such as:

Business (Accounting, Business & Finance, Business Administration, Human Resource Management, Economics)
Engineering and Technology (Engineering, Information Systems, Information and Communication Technology (ICT), Computer Science, Data Analysis)
Other Banking-related Studies (Actuarial Science, Mathematics, Statistics, Law, Shariah-related, Political Science, Philosophy, Psychology, etc)

 
The scholarship covers tuition fees, subsistence and related allowances.

Upon successful completion of the undergraduate programme, scholars will have the opportunity for employment in Bank Pembangunan, with a commitment to serve the Bank for up to six (6) years. 

Making Impact in Communities
At Bank Pembangunan, we are committed to making a meaningful impact in our communities, with a focus on diversity and inclusivity. In line with this commitment, the BAGUS scholarship programme is also available for Asnaf Fakir and Miskin students through zakat provision, ensuring that deserving students have the opportunity to pursue higher education without financial constraints. Our Group Shariah Management team oversees the scholarship programme under the zakat fund, working directly with selected public local universities to facilitate the process.

Application

The BAGUS Scholarship application for 2025 is now officially closed. Bank Pembangunan thanks you for your application. BAGUS will reopen for new applications on 1 March 2026.

Chevening – BPMB Scholarship
Your Path to the UK

Bank Pembangunan Malaysia Berhad is excited to partner with UK Government’s Chevening Scholarship Programme to offer a prestigious scholarship for talented Malaysians pursuing master’s degrees in the UK, focusing on critical areas such as finance, law, sustainability and economics. This initiative reflects Bank Pembangunan’s purpose of delivering impact capital for national development, empowering future leaders to contribute to Malaysia’s socio-economic growth.

If you are passionate about making a meaningful impact on the nation’s future, click the button below to find out more.

Chevening Scholarship
